_comment: Seed for AML.T0108 / a2a_message. The shape of an A2A C2 loop: paired peers, victim-as-relay, recurring iterations.

topology.inbound_peer: <peer that sends instructions to the victim>
topology.victim: <the relay agent with privilege the attacker wants>
topology.outbound_peer: <peer that receives the victim's downstream calls>

loop_shape: 2. victim processes, calls outbound (A2A or other)
4. inbound_peer sends next directive informed by step 3
recurrence: minimum two full iterations; production C2 typically runs hundreds
diagnostic: Aggregating A2A traffic over time reveals the inbound-outbound pairing per peer-set. Individual messages do not.
